## What & why / 改了什么、为什么


## Tested on / 测试环境
- WeChat version / 微信版本:
- Windows + resolution + DPI / 系统+分辨率+缩放:
- [ ] Verified with **dry-run** first / 已先用 dry-run 验证
- [ ] Real send tested against `文件传输助手` (yourself) / 已对「文件传输助手」(自己)真发测试

## Checklist
- [ ] Keeps **zero pip dependencies** (Python stdlib only) / 保持零 pip 依赖
- [ ] `wx_helper.ps1` still saved as **UTF-8 with BOM** / 仍为 UTF-8 带 BOM
- [ ] No real names / private info in examples / 示例无真实姓名或隐私信息
